title: Default output format is JSON
context: The tool is used both interactively by humans and programmatically by AI agents (e.g. Claude Code via the rcli skill). A single default must be chosen for the --format flag.
rationale: AI agents consume structured output reliably without needing --format json on every call. Humans can override to table/markdown/html when needed. JSON is also machine-readable by shell scripts. The table format (Rich) is still fully available.
